news.title:
Orient Green Power allotted 61.4 lakh shares to Delta Renewable at Rs.10 each.
Post allotment, Orient Green's holding in Delta, a solar project firm, remains 70%.
news.summary:
Orient Green Power allotted 61.4 lakh shares to Delta Renewable at Rs.10 each.
Post allotment, Orient Green's holding in Delta, a solar project firm, remains 70%.

news.title:
Orient Green Power completed 2 wind turbines (6.6 MW) in Tamil Nadu.
Service connection received; 3.3 MW installation and commissioning in progress.
news.summary:
Orient Green Power completed 2 wind turbines (6.6 MW) in Tamil Nadu.
Service connection received; 3.3 MW installation and commissioning in progress.

news.title:
Orient Green Power's subsidiary Gamma Green Power erected 2 WTGs of 3.3 MW, totaling 6.6 MW.
Commissioning of WTGs and remaining 3.3 MW capacity is progressing; updates to follow.
news.summary:
Orient Green Power's subsidiary Gamma Green Power erected 2 WTGs of 3.3 MW, totaling 6.6 MW.
Commissioning of WTGs and remaining 3.3 MW capacity is progressing; updates to follow.

news.title:
SVL Ltd. gains NCLT approval to merge NPPL and SEPL; both cease post-merger.
Promoter holding consolidates into SVL, aggregate remains unchanged at 24.4%.
news.summary:
SVL Ltd. gains NCLT approval to merge NPPL and SEPL; both cease post-merger.
Promoter holding consolidates into SVL, aggregate remains unchanged at 24.4%.

news.title:
Orient Green Power signed a Rs. 4.85 Cr contract with Suzlon for a 6.3 MW wind project.
The project, located in Devarkulam, Tamil Nadu, is set for completion by June 2026.
news.summary:
Orient Green Power signed a Rs. 4.85 Cr contract with Suzlon for a 6.3 MW wind project.
The project, located in Devarkulam, Tamil Nadu, is set for completion by June 2026.

news.title:
Orient Green Power aims for 1 GW capacity with 28 MW addition by mid-2026.
Company expects Rs.36 crore EBITDA boost from expansion efforts.
news.summary:
Orient Green Power aims for 1 GW capacity with 28 MW addition by mid-2026.
Company expects Rs.36 crore EBITDA boost from expansion efforts.

news.title:
Orient Green Power announces an investor call on Feb 16, 2026, at 12 PM for Q3 & 9M FY26 results.
Details are available on their website and have been shared with BSE and NSE under Regulation 30.
news.summary:
Orient Green Power announces an investor call on Feb 16, 2026, at 12 PM for Q3 & 9M FY26 results.
Details are available on their website and have been shared with BSE and NSE under Regulation 30.

news.title: Orient Green Power's Q3 revenue rose to 360M rupees from 345M YoY.
news.summary: Orient Green Power's Q3 revenue rose to 360M rupees from 345M YoY.

news.title:
Orient Green Power's subsidiary approved EPC contract for 3 wind turbines of 9.9 MW.
The Rs. 85.05 Cr contract in Tamil Nadu targets completion by April 30, 2026.
news.summary:
Orient Green Power's subsidiary approved EPC contract for 3 wind turbines of 9.9 MW.
The Rs. 85.05 Cr contract in Tamil Nadu targets completion by April 30, 2026.

news.title:
Orient Green Power to hold board meeting on Feb 4, 2026, to review unaudited financial results.
Results to cover standalone and consolidated performance for the quarter and nine months ending Dec 31, 2025.
news.summary:
Orient Green Power to hold board meeting on Feb 4, 2026, to review unaudited financial results.
Results to cover standalone and consolidated performance for the quarter and nine months ending Dec 31, 2025.

news.title:
Orient Green Power's subsidiary, Clarion, signed a contract with Suzlon Energy for 6.3 MW wind energy generators.
The Rs. 32.87 crore contract will repower the Devarkulam wind farm and is set for execution by June 30, 2026.
news.summary:
Orient Green Power's subsidiary, Clarion, signed a contract with Suzlon Energy for 6.3 MW wind energy generators.
The Rs. 32.87 crore contract will repower the Devarkulam wind farm and is set for execution by June 30, 2026.

news.title:
Orient Green Power launches 7 MW AC solar project in Tamil Nadu.
The project, under group captive model, will complete by Dec 5, 2025.
news.summary:
Orient Green Power launches 7 MW AC solar project in Tamil Nadu.
The project, under group captive model, will complete by Dec 5, 2025.

news.title:
Orient Green Power's subsidiary Beta Wind Farm's credit rating upgraded to IVR BBB Stable.
Long-term bank facility reduced to Rs. 518.95 Cr; moderate safety rating affirmed.
news.summary:
Orient Green Power's subsidiary Beta Wind Farm's credit rating upgraded to IVR BBB Stable.
Long-term bank facility reduced to Rs. 518.95 Cr; moderate safety rating affirmed.

news.title:
Delhi High Court upheld a ₹6.5 crore claim against Orient Green Power on Nov 27, 2025.
An additional ₹3.17 crore provision will be made this quarter by the company.
news.summary:
Delhi High Court upheld a ₹6.5 crore claim against Orient Green Power on Nov 27, 2025.
An additional ₹3.17 crore provision will be made this quarter by the company.

news.title:
Orient Green Power's Q2 FY26 results show 10% YoY revenue growth to ₹135.5cr, net profit up 22% to ₹80.9cr.
H1 FY26 saw total income rise 20% YoY to ₹228.6cr; net profit surged 38% YoY, driven by stable wind conditions and operational efficiency.
news.summary:
Orient Green Power's Q2 FY26 results show 10% YoY revenue growth to ₹135.5cr, net profit up 22% to ₹80.9cr.
H1 FY26 saw total income rise 20% YoY to ₹228.6cr; net profit surged 38% YoY, driven by stable wind conditions and operational efficiency.

news.title:
Orient Green Power plans to add 25 MW solar capacity by mid-2026.
The company targets expanding operational capacity to 1,000 MW.
news.summary:
Orient Green Power plans to add 25 MW solar capacity by mid-2026.
The company targets expanding operational capacity to 1,000 MW.

news.title:
Orient Green Power Co's Q2 FY25 net profit up 21.2% to Rs 80.9 crore.
Sales rose 8% to Rs 131 crore compared to Q2 FY24.
news.summary:
Orient Green Power Co's Q2 FY25 net profit up 21.2% to Rs 80.9 crore.
Sales rose 8% to Rs 131 crore compared to Q2 FY24.

news.title:
Q2 results on Nov 5 for Britannia, Aurobindo Pharma, Sun Pharma, Grasim, Ramco Cements, and more.
Live updates include results for Tube Investments, Astral, Blue Star, BEML, and Honeywell Automation.
news.summary:
Q2 results on Nov 5 for Britannia, Aurobindo Pharma, Sun Pharma, Grasim, Ramco Cements, and more.
Live updates include results for Tube Investments, Astral, Blue Star, BEML, and Honeywell Automation.

news.title:
Orient Green Power schedules Q2 & H1 FY26 earnings call on Nov 7, 2025 at 10:30 AM.
Details available on company website; disclaimer highlights potential risks in forward-looking statements.
news.summary:
Orient Green Power schedules Q2 & H1 FY26 earnings call on Nov 7, 2025 at 10:30 AM.
